MINI MINUTES:

Melinda Jane Steuer, Esq. (916.930.0045; msteuer@californiainvestoradvocate.com) for Petitioner.
Jessica B. King, Esq. (310.362.4970; jessicak@ttelawgroup.com) of TTE Law Group LLP for Respondent.

A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER KARIN BURG'S Hearing On Petition To Vacate Arbitration Award is taken under submission.
